result: I’d make human minds incapable of cruelty without feeling it—so every wound inflicted, every spirit broken, every quiet hope extinguished would echo back, full force, in the chest of the one who dealt it. No punishment, no reward, just perfect, unavoidable empathy. The world would still struggle, still disagree, still compete—but no one would be able to harm another without tasting the same hurt. Overnight, war, exploitation, and casual neglect would become unbearable to the very people who once ordered them. The shape of civilization would have to change, because cruelty would no longer be someone else’s problem.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
